_comment: Tier-2 for fenics nonlinear_pde / magnetostatics: dolfinx FiniteElement.interpolation_points is a PROPERTY (returns ndarray of shape (n_points, gdim)), NOT a method. The dolfinx 0.10 _version_info banner correctly says so, but 5 generator templates in advanced.py called it as () — TypeError 'numpy.ndarray object is not callable' on every LLM-followed template. Fixed all 5 in same commit. Verified empirically 2026-06-01 (dolfinx 0.10.0).
